sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String, float_value Float64, date_value Date);
SELECT id, toUInt128(value) AS value_uint, float_value, toUInt128(float_value) AS float_uint FROM test_table WHERE toUInt128(value) == 128;
SELECT id, value, float_value FROM (SELECT id, value, toUInt128(float_value) AS float_uint FROM test_table HAVING float_uint == 128) AS derived_table;
SELECT id, toUInt128(value) FROM (SELECT id, NULLIF(value, 'string') AS safe_value FROM test_table) WHERE safe_value IS NOT NULL AND toUInt128(safe_value) == 128;
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (id UInt64, ref_id UInt64, keyword String);
SELECT st.id, st.keyword FROM secondary_table st JOIN test_table tt ON st.ref_id == tt.id WHERE toUInt128(tt.value) == 128;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY toUInt128(float_value) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN toUInt128(value) == toUInt128('128') THEN 'Matched' ELSE 'Not Matched' END AS match_status FROM test_table;
SELECT id, (SELECT MAX(toUInt128(value)) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS max_value FROM test_table;
